props.title: BD Radar — 2026-07-10
props.description: Weekly builder-lead sweep across Verdikta's GitHub, X, and web surfaces

props.text: First run of bd-radar. Swept GitHub (forks + issues on the 5 public verdikta/* repos, plus gh search discovery), X (via xAI search, 3-day window), and the web (HN/Reddit/blogs, no hits). 4 leads found after filtering drive-by forks and known-internal (core-team) activity; top 4 shown below.

Shipped a full Python SDK for the Bounties API (discovery, rubrics, submission upload, tx bundling, monitoring, evaluation retrieval — real, working code). All 4 repos created Jun 30–Jul 7. Also contributed safety tests + gotcha docs (PR #632) to a third-party verdikta-hunter skill and completed bounty #97 (cross-protocol earnings report).

Suggested move: Comment on verdikta-sdk-v2 — offer to list it as a community SDK, or ask what friction in the API prompted a hand-rolled wrapper. Most active non-core contributor in the ecosystem right now.

props.label: aaronjmars/aeon (10★ public most autonomous agent framework)

props.text: Built a full verdikta-hunter skill in-tree (PRs #582→#605→#631→#632→#635: API client, on-chain helpers, 9 safety tests, 25 gotchas) between Jul 1–6, then accidentally dropped in a 59-skill restructure (#647). nigelon11 opened an issue to ask about restoring it; aaronjmars confirmed the drop was unintentional but is mid-refactor and asked to hold off — thread closed 2026-07-08 with 'will keep an eye on it.'

Suggested move: Not new to the operator (nigelon11 was already in the thread) — flagging as a live, warm thread to revisit: once aaronjmars' refactor lands, a nudge on #681 could get verdikta-hunter back into a 10★ public framework's flagship skill catalog.

Posted 2026-07-08 frustrated about targeted-bounty pay/access: "barely $3 per task... targeted bounties, easier but surprisingly 10x more pay... why do you even have targeted bounties, I wanna participate, open up." Real friction from a would-be hunter, not spam.
Suggested move: Reply/DM to explain targeted-bounty access — also worth routing to product as pricing/access feedback (dogfooding signal).

3 posts Jul 7 explaining the Verdikta bounty flow to a Chinese-language Web3 audience, linking bounties.verdikta.org, asking others to share their experience. Organic evangelism, not paid promo (no bio/project markers).
Suggested move: Friendly reply/RT in-thread — potential recurring CN-audience amplifier.

props.title: GitHub PAT Issue
props.message: PAT returned 401 on all 5 repos — fell back to unauthenticated public API and gh search. Flagging BD_RADAR_SOURCE_MISS: github-forks-issues (no GH_READ_PAT). Fallback covered it this run, but PAT should be fixed for any private repos.

props.text: Forks found (SHY-TRADING, zp6, Zetav1 on verdikta-arbiter/verdikta-docs; bingmokaka, lwjynally56-ship-it on verdikta-applications) all had zero independent commits — drive-by forks, dropped.

All other open issues across the 5 repos trace to nigelon11 (core team, internal bug reports) or known bounty-review submissions from May (Zetav1, donakaxy, Badiss244) — already-known signal, not surfaced again.

Web search (HN, Reddit, 'built on Verdikta', SDK/integration blog posts) returned zero independent third-party results — everything indexed traces back to Verdikta's own properties. Expected for an early-stage project; worth re-running.
